description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for a .NET solution using NuGet and MSBuild on Windows. Use a global before_script that echoes "starting build for %PROJECT_NAME%" and "Restoring NuGet Packages..." then runs nuget restore "src/%PROJECT_NAME%.sln". Define a build stage with a build job that runs only on the master branch, echoes "Building artifacts..." and executes "C:\Program Files (x86)\MSBuild\14.0\Bin\MsBuild.exe" /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount:1 /p:Configuration=%CONFIG_TYPE% /p:DeployOnBuild=true /p:PublishProfile="C:\temp\PublishProfiles\%PROJECT_NAME%\publish.pubxml" "src/%PROJECT_NAME%.sln", and publishes artifacts named "%CI_PROJECT_NAME%_%CI_BUILD_ID%-%CI_BUILD_REF_NAME%" from src/%PROJECT_NAME%/obj/%CONFIG_TYPE%/Package/PackageTmp/. Add a validateBuild stage with a validateBuild job that runs on all branches except master in the baldvinth/eve.singlesignon project, echoes "Validating build..." and runs "C:\Program Files (x86)\MSBuild\14.0\Bin\MsBuild.exe" /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount:1 /p:Configuration=Debug "src/%PROJECT_NAME%.sln". Set variables CONFIG_TYPE=Release and PROJECT_NAME=EVE.SingleSignOn.
